---
description: "Use when editing TypeScript or TSX files in this repository. Prefer preserving existing component, styling, and architecture patterns over introducing new patterns unless explicitly requested."
name: "TypeScript Pattern Consistency"
applyTo: "**/*.ts, **/*.tsx"
---
# TypeScript And TSX Pattern Consistency

- Treat this as a preference-level guideline, not a hard blocker.
- Preserve existing project patterns for component structure, naming, state usage, and styling approach.
- Avoid introducing new architectural patterns, state libraries, or styling paradigms unless explicitly requested.
- Keep changes minimal and localized to the task.
- Match existing conventions in nearby files before proposing abstractions or refactors.
